# DevKit — GitHub Copilot Instructions

> **Important rule**: Before implementing any feature, **MUST read the full relevant section** in this file to avoid duplicates, reuse existing code, and follow the correct patterns.

---

## 1. Tech Stack & Environment

| Layer | Technology |
|---|---|
| Backend | Laravel 11, PHP 8.2+, FrankenPHP + Octane |
| Frontend | React 18, TypeScript, Inertia.js, Vite |
| UI | Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui components |
| Database | MySQL 8.0+ |
| Queue | Redis |
| Container | Docker — container name `frankenphp`, working dir `/app/devkit` |

**All PHP/Composer/NPM commands must run inside the container:**
```bash
docker exec -it frankenphp bash -c "cd /app/devkit && php artisan [command]"
docker exec -it frankenphp bash -c "cd /app/devkit && composer [command]"
docker exec -it frankenphp bash -c "cd /app/devkit && npm run [command]"
```

---

## 2. Backend Architecture

### 2.1 Directory Structure (Feature-Based)

```
app/
├── Enums/[Feature]/            # PHP 8.1 Backed Enums (string/int)
├── Models/[Feature]/           # Eloquent models — final class
├── Contracts/[Feature]/        # Interfaces: Repository + Service
├── Repositories/
│   ├── BaseRepository.php      # Base CRUD — ALL repos must extend this
│   └── [Feature]/              # READ ONLY — no write operations
├── Services/[Feature]/         # Business logic + writes + adapters
├── Http/
│   ├── Controllers/[Feature]/  # Thin HTTP layer
│   ├── Resources/[Feature]/    # API Resources — always use for responses
│   └── Requests/               # FormRequest validation
├── Jobs/[Feature]/             # Background jobs
└── Providers/AppServiceProvider.php  # DI bindings
```

### 2.2 Checklist for Adding a New Feature

1. `app/Enums/[Feature]/` — define enums first
2. `app/Models/[Feature]/` — model with fillable, casts, relationships
3. `database/migrations/` — migration (date prefix `2026_MM_DD_HHMMSS_`)
4. `app/Contracts/[Feature]/[Entity]RepositoryInterface.php`
5. `app/Contracts/[Feature]/[Entity]ServiceInterface.php`
6. `app/Repositories/[Feature]/[Entity]Repository.php` — extends `BaseRepository`
7. `app/Services/[Feature]/[Entity]Service.php`
8. `app/Http/Resources/[Feature]/[Entity]Resource.php`
9. `app/Http/Controllers/[Feature]/[Entity]Controller.php`
10. `app/Providers/AppServiceProvider.php` — register bindings
11. `routes/web.php` — add routes
12. `bootstrap/app.php` — add CSRF exclusion if public API

### 2.3 BaseRepository — Available Methods

**Do NOT redefine in subclasses:**
- `findById(int $id): ?Model`
- `findByIdOrFail(int $id): Model`
- `findBy(string $column, mixed $value): ?Model`
- `getAll(): Collection`
- `getAllWith(array $relations): Collection`
- `paginate(int $perPage = 15): LengthAwarePaginator`
- `paginateWith(array $relations, int $perPage): LengthAwarePaginator`
- `count(): int`
- `countBy(string $column, mixed $value): int`
- `exists(int $id): bool`
- `existsBy(string $column, mixed $value): bool`
- `getWhere(string $column, mixed $value): Collection`
- `getWhereWith(string $column, mixed $value, array $relations): Collection`
- `firstWhere(string $column, mixed $value): ?Model`
- `getOrderedBy(string $column, string $direction = 'asc'): Collection`
- `getLatest(int $limit = 10): Collection`

### 2.4 CSRF Exclusion — Public Endpoints

File `bootstrap/app.php` → `validateCsrfTokens(except: [...])`:
```php
'api/*',
'webhook/*',      // Webhook Catcher
'webhooks/*',     // Webhook management API
'fake-api/*',     // Fake API responder
'fake-api-tool/*', // Fake API management API
```
**When adding a new public tool**, add its path here + run `php artisan optimize:clear`.

### 2.5 Adapter Pattern (Email)

`app/Services/Email/Adapters/` — each provider (SMTP, SendGrid, AWS SES) implements `EmailAdapterInterface`. When adding a new email provider, create `Adapters/[ProviderName]/` with `Client.php` and `Service.php`.

### 2.6 Service Provider Bindings — Current Template

```php
// AppServiceProvider.php — registration pattern:
$this->app->bind(XxxRepositoryInterface::class, XxxRepository::class);
$this->app->bind(XxxServiceInterface::class, XxxService::class);
```

Currently registered features: **Calendar, Email, Notification, Webhook, FakeApi**.

---

## 3. Frontend Architecture

### 3.1 Directory Structure

```
resources/js/
├── actions/                    # Auto-generated by wayfinder (do not edit manually)
├── components/
│   ├── ui/                     # shadcn/ui — use directly, do NOT recreate
│   ├── [Feature]/              # Feature components (Webhook/, FakeApi/, etc.)
│   ├── data-view/              # Reusable data display (CardView, ListView, ViewToggle)
│   └── *.tsx                   # Shared components (heading, nav-main, etc.)
├── hooks/                      # Custom React hooks
├── layouts/                    # App + Auth layouts
├── lib/
│   └── utils.ts                # cn(), toUrl() utils
├── pages/
│   ├── [Feature]/              # Inertia pages — PascalCase folder
│   ├── auth/                   # Auth pages — lowercase
│   ├── settings/               # Settings pages — lowercase
│   └── tools/                  # Tools pages — lowercase
├── routes/                     # Auto-generated route helpers (wayfinder)
└── types/                      # TypeScript interfaces
```

### 3.2 Shared Utilities — MUST use instead of rewriting

#### `lib/utils.ts`
```ts
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'      // Merge Tailwind classes: cn('base', condition && 'extra')
import { toUrl } from '@/lib/utils'   // Convert InertiaLinkProps href -> string
```

#### Available Hooks
| Hook | File | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `useAppearance()` | `hooks/use-appearance.tsx` | dark/light/system theme |
| `useClipboard()` | `hooks/use-clipboard.ts` | Copy to clipboard with state |
| `useCurrentUrl()` | `hooks/use-current-url.ts` | Check active URL, isCurrentUrl(), whenCurrentUrl() |
| `useMobileNavigation()` | `hooks/use-mobile-navigation.ts` | Cleanup pointer-events on nav |
| `useMobile()` | `hooks/use-mobile.tsx` | Detect mobile breakpoint |
| `useInitials()` | `hooks/use-initials.tsx` | Get user initials |
| `useWebhook()` | `hooks/use-webhook.ts` | Webhook state + polling logic |
| `useFakeApi()` | `hooks/use-fake-api.ts` | FakeAPI state + polling logic |
| `useNotifications()` | `hooks/notification/useNotifications.ts` | Notification state |
| `useTwoFactorAuth()` | `hooks/use-two-factor-auth.ts` | 2FA flow |

#### Route helpers (auto-generated — wayfinder)
```ts
// Standard usage — import from routes/
import { dashboard, login, register } from '@/routes';
import { index as calendarIndex } from '@/routes/calendar';
// Available routes: calendar, email, fake-api, notifications, webhooks, settings, tools
```

#### Shared Components
```tsx
// Heading (title + optional description)
import Heading from '@/components/heading';
<Heading title="..." description="..." variant="default|small" />

// AppearanceToggleButton (compact theme toggle)
import AppearanceToggleButton from '@/components/appearance-toggle-button';
<AppearanceToggleButton className="..." />

// AppearanceTabs (full 3-button toggle)
import AppearanceTabs from '@/components/appearance-tabs';

// DataView (card/list view with toggle)
import { CardView, ListView, ViewToggle } from '@/components/data-view';

// AlertError
import { AlertError } from '@/components/alert-error';
```

### 3.3 UI Components (shadcn/ui) — Full List

```
Alert, Avatar, Badge, Breadcrumb, Button, Card/CardHeader/CardTitle/CardContent,
Checkbox, Collapsible, Dialog, DropdownMenu, Icon, Input, InputOTP, Label,
NavigationMenu, PlaceholderPattern, Select, Separator, Sheet, Sidebar (full set),
Skeleton, Spinner, Textarea, Toggle, ToggleGroup, Tooltip
```
**Do NOT create custom styled buttons/inputs** — use variants of the components above.

### 3.4 Layout Patterns

**Authenticated pages** → `AppLayout` (sidebar):
```tsx
import AppLayout from '@/layouts/app-layout';
export default function MyPage() {
    return <AppLayout breadcrumbs={[...]}><Head title="..." />{content}</AppLayout>;
}
```

**Public tool pages** (Webhook, FakeApi) → full-screen with custom header:
```tsx
<div className="flex h-screen flex-col overflow-hidden bg-background">
    <header className="shrink-0 border-b ...">...</header>
    <main className="flex w-full flex-1 flex-col gap-2 overflow-hidden px-4 py-2 sm:px-6">
        ...
    </main>
</div>
```

**Auth pages** → `AuthLayout` (wraps `AuthSimpleLayout`):
```tsx
import AuthLayout from '@/layouts/auth-layout';
```

### 3.5 TypeScript Types

**Shared types** in `types/index.ts` re-exported from: `auth`, `navigation`, `notification`, `ui`, `webhook`.

**Feature-specific types** → `types/[feature].ts` (e.g., `types/fake-api.ts`).

`SharedData` (from Inertia page props):
```ts
import type { SharedData } from '@/types';
const { auth } = usePage<SharedData>().props;
```

### 3.6 Responsive Design Rules

- Mobile-first: default styles for mobile, use `sm:`, `md:`, `lg:`, `xl:`
- Standard padding: `p-4` mobile, `p-6` desktop (`px-4 py-2 sm:px-6`)
- Standard gaps: `gap-2` (tight), `gap-4` (default), `gap-6` (sections)
- Use `cn()` from `@/lib/utils` to merge classes conditionally

---

## 4. Existing Features

### 4.1 Webhook Tester (Public, No Auth)
- **URL**: `/webhooks` — page, `/webhook/{uuid}` — catcher
- **Pattern**: fingerprint → endpoint UUID → polling `/webhooks/endpoints/{uuid}/requests`
- **Hook**: `use-webhook.ts` — `initEndpoint`, `fetchRequests`, `startPolling`, `clearRequests`, `markRequestSeen`, `updateSettings`
- **Components**: `Webhook/WebhookUrlBar.tsx`, `Webhook/RequestInspector.tsx`
- **Catcher** returns `default_response_body` with `default_status_code`

### 4.2 Fake API Tool (Public, No Auth)
- **URL**: `/fake-api-tool` — page, `/fake-api/{uuid}` — responder (supports sub-path `/{uuid}/{path}`)
- **Fingerprint prefix**: `fakeapi_` (avoids collision with Webhook)
- **Pattern**: like Webhook but user **defines the response** instead of inspecting requests
- **Hook**: `use-fake-api.ts` — `initEndpoint`, `fetchLogs`, `startPolling`, `clearLogs`, `updateEndpoint`
- **Components**: `FakeApi/FakeApiUrlBar.tsx`, `FakeApi/ResponseEditor.tsx`, `FakeApi/LogInspector.tsx`
- **Responder**: auto CORS headers (`Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *`), supports `delay_ms`

### 4.3 Calendar (Auth Required)
- **Routes**: `Route::resource('calendar', CalendarController::class)` + `calendar/overview`
- **Models**: `CalendarEvent` (has `EventType`, `EventColor`, `ReminderType` enums), `CalendarReminder`
- **Components**: `google-style-calendar.tsx`, `calendar-event-form.tsx`
- **Lib**: `lib/vietnamese-calendar.ts` — helper for Vietnamese lunar/solar calendar

### 4.4 Notifications (Auth Required)
- **3 sub-features**: Notification list, Channel Settings, Templates
- **Channels**: webhook, email, slack (enum `NotificationChannel`)
- **Jobs**: `SendNotificationJob` with queue
- **Pattern**: `NotificationTypeRegistry` — registry pattern for registering notification types

### 4.5 Email (Auth Required)
- **2 sub-features**: Providers, Templates
- **Adapter pattern**: SMTP, SendGrid, AWS SES
- **Models**: `EmailProvider`, `EmailTemplate`

### 4.6 Tools (Mixed Auth)
- **JSON Tools** (`/tools/json`) — Public
- **Encoder/Decoder** (`/tools/encoder-decoder`) — Auth required
- **Service**: `EncoderDecoderService`

### 4.7 Settings (Auth Required)
- Profile, Password, Appearance, Two-Factor Authentication
- **Appearance** uses `use-appearance.tsx` hook + cookie persistence

---

## 5. Public Tool Pattern (Webhook / FakeApi)

When adding a new public tool, follow this pattern:

### Backend
```php
// 1. Dedicated endpoint type in EndpointStatus enum
// 2. Dedicated fingerprint with prefix to avoid collision
//    e.g.: 'fakeapi_' . $fingerprint
// 3. Route manager (GET page, POST createOrGet, PUT update, GET logs, DELETE logs)
// 4. Route responder (Route::any with optional path)
// 5. CSRF exclude both path groups in bootstrap/app.php
```

### Frontend
```tsx
// 1. types/[feature].ts — interfaces
// 2. hooks/use-[feature].ts — state + polling (interval typically 2-3s)
// 3. pages/[Feature]/Index.tsx — full-screen layout
// 4. components/[Feature]/ — URL bar, inspector/editor
// 5. Add to TOOLS array in pages/welcome.tsx
// 6. AppearanceToggleButton in page header
```

### Polling Hook Pattern (standard)
```ts
// Must have: lastPollTimeRef to track 'since' timestamp
// initEndpoint → fetchAll → startPolling(interval)
// Polling only fetches 'since' last poll to save bandwidth
// stopPolling in useEffect cleanup
```

---

## 6. Route Types

| Type | Pattern | Auth | CSRF |
|---|---|---|---|
| Inertia page | `Route::get(...)` returning `Inertia::render(...)` | varies | Yes |
| API (management) | `Route::post/put/delete(...)` returning `JsonResponse` | varies | Yes (unless excluded) |
| Public catcher/responder | `Route::any(...)` | No | **Excluded** |

**Inertia page render**: `Inertia::render('Feature/PageName', ['data' => ...])`
**Page file location**: `resources/js/pages/Feature/PageName.tsx`

---

## 7. Navigation — Sidebar (Auth)

File: `components/app-sidebar.tsx` — `mainNavItems` array.

When adding a new auth feature:
```ts
// Append to mainNavItems
{
    title: 'Feature Name',
    href: '/feature-path',
    icon: LucideIconName,
    // Use 'items' array instead of 'href' for sub-items
    items: [
        { title: 'Sub page', href: '/feature/sub' },
    ],
}
```

Navigation uses `useCurrentUrl()` to highlight the active item — **no manual logic needed**.

---

## 8. Naming Conventions

### PHP
| Type | Convention | Example |
|---|---|---|
| Model | `PascalCase` | `CalendarEvent`, `FakeApiEndpoint` |
| Controller | `{Entity}Controller` | `FakeApiController` |
| Service | `{Entity}Service` | `FakeApiService` |
| Repository | `{Entity}Repository` | `FakeApiEndpointRepository` |
| Resource | `{Entity}Resource` | `FakeApiEndpointResource` |
| Interface | `{Entity}{Purpose}Interface` | `FakeApiServiceInterface` |
| Enum | descriptive name | `EndpointStatus`, `EventType` |
| Migration | `YYYY_MM_DD_HHMMSS_description` | `2026_03_12_100000_create_fake_api_tables` |

### TypeScript/React
| Type | Convention | Example |
|---|---|---|
| Page component | `PascalCase` in `pages/Feature/` | `pages/FakeApi/Index.tsx` |
| Feature component | `PascalCase` in `components/Feature/` | `components/FakeApi/ResponseEditor.tsx` |
| Hook | `use-kebab-case.ts` | `use-fake-api.ts` |
| Types file | `kebab-case.ts` | `fake-api.ts` |
| Util/lib | `kebab-case.ts` | `utils.ts`, `vietnamese-calendar.ts` |

---

## 9. Code Quality Rules

```php
declare(strict_types=1);       // Required at the top of every PHP file
final class MyClass            // final unless designed to be extended
private readonly Service $svc  // readonly properties in constructor
```

- **Methods ≤ 20 lines** — extract if longer
- **Repositories are READ-only** — no create/update/delete
- **Services handle WRITE** — use Model::create(), $model->update(), $model->delete()
- **Controllers are thin** — validate → delegate → return Resource
- **API Resources** — always wrap responses, never return raw model/array

---

## 10. Implementing a New Feature — Required Process

### Step 1: Review Context
- [ ] Are there any reusable Enums? (`app/Enums/`)
- [ ] Does BaseRepository have the needed methods? (see section 2.3)
- [ ] Is there a suitable existing hook? (see section 3.2)
- [ ] Which UI components are needed? (see section 3.3)
- [ ] Which pattern is the closest match? (Webhook? FakeApi? Calendar?)

### Step 2: Check for Collisions
- Fingerprint prefix if using fingerprint-based endpoints (avoid collisions)
- Route paths must not conflict with existing paths
- CSRF exclusion if public endpoint

### Step 3: Implement (Backend first, Frontend second)
- Create in the order from checklist 2.2
- Register bindings in `AppServiceProvider`
- Run migration: `docker exec -it frankenphp bash -c "cd /app/devkit && php artisan migrate"`
- Clear cache after modifying `bootstrap/app.php`: `php artisan optimize:clear`

### Step 4: Frontend
- Create types → hook → components → page
- Add to sidebar if auth feature
- Add to TOOLS array in `welcome.tsx` if public tool

### Step 5: Update Context
After completing the feature, **update section 4** (Existing Features) with:
- URL pattern
- Hook name and methods
- Components
- Unique characteristics

---

## 11. Anti-patterns — DO NOT do these

```php
// ❌ Write operations in repository
public function create(array $data) { ... }

// ❌ Return raw model from controller
return response()->json($event);

// ❌ Business logic in controller
public function store(Request $request) {
    $event->start_date = Carbon::parse($request->start);  // this logic belongs in Service
    $event->save();
}

// ❌ Facade instead of DI
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;  // use repository instead
```

```tsx
// ❌ Custom button style
<button className="bg-blue-500 px-4 py-2 rounded">...</button>
// ✅ Use Button component
<Button variant="default" size="sm">...</Button>

// ❌ Inline clipboard logic
navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);  // duplicate
// ✅ Use useClipboard hook
const [copiedText, copy] = useClipboard();

// ❌ Hardcoded URL string
href="/fake-api-tool"
// ✅ Use route helper when available
import { index as fakeApiIndex } from '@/routes/fake-api';

// ❌ Arbitrary spacing
className="mt-[17px] mb-[13px]"
// ✅ Tailwind scale
className="mt-4 mb-3"
```

---

## 12. Database Conventions

- Foreign keys: `{table_singular}_id` (e.g., `fake_api_endpoint_id`)
- UUID column: `$table->uuid('uuid')->unique()`
- Enum columns: `$table->string('status', 20)->default('active')->index()`
- JSON columns: `$table->json('headers')` → cast `'headers' => 'array'` in model
- Timestamps: use `timestamps()` for entities, `timestamp('created_at')->useCurrent()` for immutable logs
- Indexes: foreign key columns + status + expires_at + composite (endpoint_id, created_at)
